calendar.matters:
COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Apr-14-2025 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day sent forthwith from Department 206 for a request for default judgment against Cross Defendant Xu Q Guan.
Dept.505: Judge: Michelle Tong; Clerk: D. Carter;

Plaintiff JPMorgan Chase Bank, N.A. is present represented by Thomas J. Sebourn.
Defendant Xu Q Guan is not present.

Good cause appearing, the Court finds that the Plaintiff has proven its prima facie case and rules in favor of the Plaintiff against the Defendants as follows:
The Plaintiff shall recover from the Defendants:
Utility Damages $19,336.75
Past Due Rent $0.00
Holdover Damages $0.00
Costs $0.00
Attorney's Fees $0
Total Judgment $19336.75
Proposed judgment as modified signed and executed this day.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Apr-14-2025 Assigned To Trial Court

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-19-2024 Set For Trial On Apr-14-25 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
